import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
mut p = 1
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        p = p * n
      when None
        p = p
      end
    when None
      p = p
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
when None
  p = p
end
println("product=#{p}")
